basic_details.job_title: OAV Gudari Warden Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Gudari (OAV Gudari) Warden Notification 2026 has been released on 25-06-2026 on the official website rayagada.odisha.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the OAV Gudari Warden Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 60 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.A/B.Sc from any recognized University with at least 02 years experience in hostel management
qualification.details: Warden: B.A/B.Sc from any recognized University with at least 02 years experience in hostel management.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,621.75/- per month (Including EPF share of Employer share & Employer share)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Gudari Warden Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rayagada.odisha.gov.in/en/notice/recruitment.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download OAV Gudari Warden Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.odisha_adarsha_vidyalaya_gudari: B.A/B.Sc from any recognized University with at least 02 years experience in hostel management

content_sections.heading: OAV Gudari Warden Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OAV Gudari Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OAV Gudari Warden Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Warden: B.A/B.Sc from any recognized University with at least 02 years experience in hostel management.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 60 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 25,621.75/- per month (Including EPF share of Employer share & Employer share)

content_sections.heading: OAV Gudari Warden Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Gudari Warden Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://rayagada.odisha.gov.in/en/notice/recruitment. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OAV Gudari Warden Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Gudari Warden recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OAV Gudari Warden recruitment is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Warden post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.A/B.Sc degree from a recognized university and have at least 02 years of experience in hostel management.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Warden position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Warden post is between 30 years and 60 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,621.75 per month, which includes the employer's EPF share.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Warden post?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline by sending the filled application form along with required documents to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Warden post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Warden post at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Gudari.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and application form on the official website: https://rayagada.odisha.gov.in/en/notice/recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Warden role?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data and candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for complete information.
